summary: 41-scene recording of full app walkthrough, revision requested after pass 3 -- all screenshots captured desktop instead of app window

revision_notes.summary: All 41 screenshots capture the full desktop screen instead of the BlackTape app window. A VS Code window completely obscures the app main content area in every frame. Only the narrow left sidebar of the BlackTape app is visible. This is a Cameraman screenshot capture method bug -- it must use CDP page-level screenshots (Page.captureScreenshot) or ensure the Tauri window is in the foreground and unobscured before capturing. The storyboard itself is correct; the issue is entirely in how the checkpoint screenshots are being taken.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code editor covering the BlackTape main content area. Only the app sidebar is visible. The main interface with search bar and content area is completely hidden.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: Cameraman must use CDP Page.captureScreenshot instead of OS-level screen capture, or bring the Tauri window to foreground and minimize other windows before capturing.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code covering the artist page content. No artist name, tags, or discography visible.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: same root cause as all other scenes -- screenshot method captures desktop instead of app window.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code instead of the Style Map graph. No genre nodes or edges visible.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: same root cause -- screenshot capture method.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code instead of Crate Digging results. No artist cards visible.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: same root cause -- screenshot capture method.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code instead of Discover page. No tag cloud or results visible.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: same root cause -- screenshot capture method.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code instead of Knowledge Base shoegaze page. No genre description or related genres visible.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: same root cause -- screenshot capture method.

scene_issues.issue: Screenshot shows VS Code instead of player bar. No VU meters, transport controls, or cassette FX visible.
scene_issues.suggested_fix: Needs app fix: same root cause -- screenshot capture method.

global_issues: CRITICAL: The Cameraman is capturing full desktop screenshots instead of the Tauri app window content. A VS Code window is covering the BlackTape app in every single frame across all 41 scenes. The screenshot method must be changed to use CDP Page.captureScreenshot (which captures the WebView content directly regardless of window z-order) instead of OS-level screen capture.
All scene framing has been changed from full window to content area in the revised storyboard to signal the Cameraman should use page-level capture.
